summary: Specifies the numbering system for identification card issuers: the issuer identification number (IIN) and the structure of the primary account number (PAN), whose final digit is a check digit. Normative Annex B specifies the Luhn formula for computing modulus-10 double-add-double check digits, making this standard the formal specification of the Luhn check for card numbers.
title: Identification cards — Identification of issuers — Part 1: Numbering system
